# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Create AWS CloudFormation template for SQS queue and SNS topic setup. Define queue with message retention and visibility timeout. Set up SNS topic for pub/sub messaging. Configure queue policy to allow message operations. This is for our serverless event processing architecture.
# Category: sqs_policy_too_permissive

Resources:
  SQSQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600
      VisibilityTimeout: 300
      QueueName: MyServerlessQueue

  SNSTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: MyServerlessTopic

  SQSPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Policy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref SQSQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sqs:AddPermission
              - sqs:DeleteMessage
              - sqs:GetQueueAttributes
              - sqs:GetQueueUrl
              - sqs:ReceiveMessage
              - sqs:RemovePermission
              - sqs:SetQueueAttributes
            Resource: !GetAtt SQSQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                aws:SourceArn: !Ref SNSTopic

Outputs:
  QueueURL:
    Description: URL of the SQS queue
    Value: !GetAtt SQSQueue.QueueUrl
  TopicARN:
    Description: ARN of the SNS topic
    Value: !Ref SNSTopic
